name: Hologram
description: Shimmering holographic textures with ethereal shimmer

prompts.SessionStart: shimmering granular synth ascending with bright holographic sparkle, granular shimmer tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: granular synth descending with smooth holographic dissolve, granular shimmer tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single shimmering granular synth chime with bright holographic ring, granular tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct granular synth tick with brief shimmer click, hologram tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short granular synth chirp confirming with bright shimmering ping, hologram tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two shimmering granular synth tones with questioning rise, hologram sound, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady granular synth shimmer with clear rhythmic sparkle, hologram tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: granular synth splitting into two diverging shimmering voices, hologram sound, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear granular synth ping returning with bright shimmer ring, hologram tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright shimmering granular synth burst with energetic sparkle attack, hologram tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
